{{CargoRelic
|name=Water of Mother River
|class_id=20443
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=Mother River is one of the secrets of the Xiliangnu Kingdom. Anyone drinking the water from it would become pregnant, regardless of man or woman, and give birth to a child in just a few days. Only the water from the Abortion Spring can stop the pregnancy. Thanks to the river, the former state of Xiliangnu was able to thrive in population. A certain famous scripture-seeker from the east almost had his reputation ruined after partaking the river water out of thirst.
|fame=32
|art=16
|fth=17
|civ=13
|tech=12
|ss1=Minion Cloning SPD +0.6%
|ss2=Minion Cloning SPD +1.2%
|ss3=Minion Cloning SPD +1.8%
|ss4=Minion Cloning SPD +1.8%
|ss7=Minion Cloning SPD +1.8%<br> (Awakened)
}}
